description_long: This object is a realistic cherry fruit with a deep, rich red color and a smooth, rounded surface. The cherry is nearly spherical, with a slight indentation at the bottom and a subtle bulge on one side, giving it a natural, organic appearance. A slender, light brown stem emerges from the top center, curving gently upward and adding to the lifelike quality. The surface of the cherry appears glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing its fresh, juicy texture. There are no visible leaves or blossoms attached to the stem, and the fruit is presented as a single unit. The overall impression is of a ripe, freshly picked cherry ready to be eaten or used as a decorative element in an urban park or street market setting.
description: A single, glossy deep red cherry with a slender brown stem and a smooth, rounded surface. The fruit looks fresh and lifelike, with a natural bulge and indentation.
description_view_0: The cherry is seen from the front, showing the full round body and the stem emerging from the top center.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to the front, with the stem and rounded body clearly visible, but the slight bulge on the lower edge is more apparent.
description_view_2: The cherry's body and stem are visible, with the natural indentation at the bottom and the bulge on the side subtly highlighted.
description_view_3: Similar to the previous views, the cherry's roundness and stem are prominent, with the lower bulge and indentation visible.
